title: Keyboard Layers
description: Have too many binds? layer them.
body:
Do you have too many keybinds? Do they have a ton of conflicts? with this mod you can easily create and toggle between "layers" of keybinds in order to essentially have easily changeable keybind presets.

![visual of adding a layer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vos4ti95/images/55b665e5dc87d4ea14c407f366b64a99d3ef7453.gif "Screenshot 1")

default layer change keys are `[`, `]` and `\` for the selector.
![visual of changing layers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vos4ti95/images/7443ab13be3eff9e0eaf6b85efea29ac36ed2910.gif "Screenshot 1")

if you are using this mod, I am looking for suggestions on my discord on how to improve it.
